response.overview: Do you want to know on what age a kabouter retires, how strong he is in comparison with humans and how he deals with trolls and snotgurgles ? The first, unique video of the most famous kabouter in the world gives you answers to all of your questions. So don't wait any longer and watch fast!
response.tagline: Frank Froothof explains who they are, where they live and what they do
response.title: Kabouter De Video
